criteria.criterion: DBB-001: No runtime error when kokoro TTS provider selected — ADAPTERS map includes kokoro with lazy import and try/catch fallback

DBB-003: Architecture gap scanner reports no 'missing' for kokoro — kokoro.js adapter exists on disk

DBB-005: All existing tests pass — all test files passed, 0 failed
DBB-006: Dead code adapters/embed.js removed — file does not exist, no references in src/
